title: Psychomotor sexological therapy
blurb: We work with both conversation and body. Psychomotor therapy unites cognition and sensation — a natural path to sexual wellbeing.

testimonials.quote: [mock] I had never spoken to anyone about my sex life. Signe made the first space where it didn't feel awkward.
[mock] We came in as a couple thinking we needed tools. What we got was feeling that we were okay.
[mock] The psychomotor work surprised me — I only realised afterwards how much my body had been holding.
